def process_request(request, action):
    if action == "create":
        if not request.user.is_authenticated:
            raise PermissionError("Not authenticated")
        if not request.user.has_perm("create"):
            raise PermissionError("No create permission")
        return create_resource(request)

    elif action == "update":
        if not request.user.is_authenticated:
            raise PermissionError("Not authenticated")
        if not request.user.has_perm("update"):
            raise PermissionError("No update permission")
        return update_resource(request)

    elif action == "delete":
        if not request.user.is_authenticated:
            raise PermissionError("Not authenticated")
        if not request.user.has_perm("delete"):
            raise PermissionError("No delete permission")
        return delete_resource(request)
